text: Being here, surrounded by glowing lights and the bold declaration of "R+D" on the wall, I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation. The space is both sterile and vibrant, hinting at innovation and the restless urge to explore. I feel both observed and observing, as if entering a laboratory of ideas where the boundaries between the human and the technological invite meditation. There is a subtle thrill in standing on the threshold of new knowledge.
